query:
_index=sec_record_email
| where (user_username matches "*" or isEmpty(user_username)) and (device_ip matches "*" or isEmpty(device_ip)) and (srcDevice_ip matches "*" or isEmpty(srcDevice_ip)) and (dstDevice_ip matches "*" or isEmpty(dstDevice_ip)) and (device_hostname matches "*" or isEmpty(device_hostname))
| metadata_sourceCategory  as _sourceCategory 
| metadata_product  as product 
| metadata_mapperName  as mapperName  
| if(isBlank(severity), "Unassigned", severity) as severity
| count by severity,user_username ,_sourceCategory, product ,mapperName
| sort by _count

sources.dashboardName: Cloud SIEM - Record Analysis - Email Records
sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides analysis of Email Records.
